title: Phonics - Vowel Sounds
subject: Language Arts
curriculum: Jamaica NSC Grade 2 - Integrated Phonics Workbook

sections.title: Short Aa Sound
sections.description: The short 'a' sound as in 'apple' — at the beginning, middle, or end of words

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'a' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: Think of 'apple' — the 'a' sounds like 'ah' at the start

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'a' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: In 'cat', the 'a' makes a short sound in the middle

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'a' sound at the END?
questions.hint: Say the word slowly — which one ends with a short 'a' sound?

questions.prompt: The word 'Jamaica' has the short 'a' sound at the ___.
questions.hint: Say 'Ja-MAI-ca' — where do you hear the short 'a'?

questions.prompt: Which word starts with the SHORT 'a' sound?
questions.hint: Ant, axe, apple all start with the short 'a' sound

questions.prompt: Which word has the short 'a' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: Say 'par-rot' — the first syllable has a short 'a' sound

questions.prompt: 'Ambulance' has the short 'a' sound at the ___.
questions.hint: The word starts with 'am' — a short 'a' at the beginning

questions.prompt: Which word does NOT have the short 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Cake' has a LONG 'a' sound — the others all have the short 'a'

sections.title: Long Aa Sound
sections.description: The long 'a' sound as in 'able' and 'paper' — at the beginning or middle of words

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'a' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: The long 'a' says its own name — like 'ay' in 'able'

questions.prompt: 'Paper' has the long 'a' sound in the ___.
questions.hint: Say 'pa-per' — the 'a' in the middle makes the long sound

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'a' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: In 'name', the 'a' says its own name — that's the long sound

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'a' sound?
questions.hint: In 'cake', the 'a' makes the long 'ay' sound

questions.prompt: 'Angel' has the long 'a' sound at the ___.
questions.hint: Say 'AN-gel' — the long 'a' is right at the start

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Ba-by' — the first syllable has the long 'a' sound

sections.title: Long and Short Aa Sounds
sections.description: Can you tell the difference between the long 'a' (as in cake) and short 'a' (as in cat)?

questions.prompt: The word 'Hazel' has which 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Hay-zel' — the 'a' says its name, so it's a long sound

questions.prompt: The word 'cat' has which 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Cat' — the 'a' makes a short 'ah' sound

questions.prompt: The word 'bacon' has which 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Bay-con' — the 'a' says its own name, so it's a long sound

questions.prompt: The word 'battle' has which 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Bat-tle' — the 'a' makes a short 'ah' sound

questions.prompt: The word 'tomato' has which 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'to-MAY-to' — the middle 'a' is long, the final 'o' has a short 'a' in some pronunciations

questions.prompt: The word 'parrot' has which 'a' sound?
questions.hint: 'Par-rot' — the 'a' makes a short 'ah' sound

sections.title: Short Ee Sound
sections.description: The short 'e' sound as in 'egg' — at the beginning or middle of words

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'e' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Egg' starts with the short 'e' sound — like 'eh'

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'e' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: 'Pen-cil' — the short 'e' is in the middle

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: My friend likes to go up and down in the ___.
questions.hint: An elevator moves up and down in a building

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: An ___ is a very big animal.
questions.hint: This animal has a trunk and big strong feet

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: The car has an ___.
questions.hint: Cars need this to run — it makes them move

questions.prompt: Which word has the short 'e' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: You sleep on a bed — the 'e' in the middle is short

questions.prompt: Riddle: I am an animal. I have big strong feet and a trunk. I am an ___.
questions.hint: This large animal lives in Africa and Asia

questions.prompt: Riddle: I look like a small room. I go up and down in a building. I am an ___.
questions.hint: People ride this up and down inside tall buildings

sections.title: Long Ee Sound
sections.description: The long 'e' sound as in 'evening' — it can be at the beginning, middle, or end of words

questions.prompt: Where is the long 'e' sound in the word 'evil'?
questions.hint: 'Ee-vil' — the long 'e' is right at the start

questions.prompt: Where is the long 'e' sound in the word 'tree'?
questions.hint: 'Tree' ends with the long 'ee' sound

questions.prompt: Where is the long 'e' sound in the word 'team'?
questions.hint: 'Team' — the 'ea' in the middle makes the long 'ee' sound

questions.prompt: Which word has the long 'e' sound at the END?
questions.hint: 'Knee' ends with the long 'ee' sound — kn-EE

questions.prompt: Which word has the long 'e' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Ee-gle' — the long 'e' is right at the start

questions.prompt: 'Female' has the long 'e' sound in the ___.
questions.hint: 'Fe-MALE' — wait, try 'FEE-male' — the long 'e' is at the beginning of the word

questions.prompt: Which word has the long 'e' sound?
questions.hint: 'Beach' has the long 'ee' sound in the middle — like 'beech'

sections.title: Short Ii Sound
sections.description: The short 'i' sound as in 'injection' — at the beginning, middle, or end of words

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'i' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Il-lit-er-ate' — the short 'i' sound is right at the start

questions.prompt: 'Pigeon' has the short 'i' sound in the ___.
questions.hint: 'Pi-geon' — the short 'i' is in the middle of the word

questions.prompt: Which word has the short 'i' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: 'Swim' — the 'i' makes a short sound in the middle

questions.prompt: 'Zucchini' has the short 'i' sound at the ___.
questions.hint: 'Zuc-chi-ni' — the final syllable has the short 'i' sound

questions.prompt: Which word has the short 'i' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'In-sane' — the short 'i' is at the very beginning

questions.prompt: What does 'income' mean?
options: a grey bird with short legs
questions.hint: Income is what you earn — money you receive for doing your job

questions.prompt: Which word has the short 'i' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: Look for the word where the 'i' makes a short sound between consonants

questions.prompt: 'Broccoli' has the short 'i' sound at the ___.
questions.hint: 'Broc-co-li' — the final syllable ends with a short 'i' sound

sections.title: Long Ii Sound
sections.description: The long 'i' sound as in 'kite' — the letter says its own name!

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'i' sound?
questions.hint: 'Kite' — the 'i' says its own name, making the long sound

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'sight'?
questions.hint: 'Sight' and 'write' both end with the same long 'i' sound

questions.prompt: 'Lime' has the long 'i' sound. Which word ALSO has the long 'i' sound?
questions.hint: 'Time' — the 'i' says its own name just like in 'lime'

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'i' sound?
questions.hint: 'Fine' — the silent 'e' at the end makes the 'i' say its name

questions.prompt: Which word rhymes with 'kite'?
questions.hint: 'Kite' and 'fight' both have the long 'i' sound at the end

questions.prompt: 'Mice' rhymes with which word?
questions.hint: 'Mice' and 'rice' both have the long 'i' — MY-ce, RY-ce

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'i' sound?
questions.hint: 'Pine' — the silent 'e' makes the 'i' say its name

sections.title: Short Oo Sound
sections.description: The short 'o' sound as in 'octopus' — at the beginning, middle, or end of words

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'o' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Oc-to-pus' — the short 'o' sound is right at the start

questions.prompt: 'Doctor' has the short 'o' sound in the ___.
questions.hint: 'Doc-tor' — the short 'o' is in the first syllable

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: Mr. Oneil uses a ___ on his farm.
questions.hint: Farmers use this big machine to help them work the land

questions.prompt: Which word has the short 'o' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Or-ange' — the short 'o' starts this fruit's name

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: The ___ is a very fast runner.
questions.hint: This large bird cannot fly but runs very fast

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: The children are climbing the ___ tree.
questions.hint: Children love climbing fruit trees — this one is orange!

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'o' sound?
questions.hint: 'Hot' — the 'o' makes a short sound between the 'h' and 't'

sections.title: Long Oo Sound
sections.description: The long 'o' sound as in 'oats' — the letter says its own name!

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'o' sound?
questions.hint: 'Rose' — the 'o' says its own name, making the long sound

questions.prompt: Riddle: I am the opposite of new. My name has 3 letters. I am ___.
questions.hint: New vs old — this word has just 3 letters

questions.prompt: Riddle: I am found in the desert. I contain water, rich soil and trees. I am an ___.
questions.hint: A cool, green spot in the middle of a hot desert

questions.prompt: Which word has the long 'o' sound at the END?
questions.hint: 'Mos-qui-to' — the final syllable ends with the long 'o' sound

questions.prompt: Riddle: People like to eat me. I am a thick liquid food. I am made from milk. I am ___.
questions.hint: This creamy food is made from milk and comes in many flavours

questions.prompt: 'Video' has the long 'o' sound. Which word ALSO has the long 'o' sound?
questions.hint: Look for the word where the 'o' says its own name

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'o' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Oats' — the 'o' says its own name right at the start

sections.title: Short Uu Sound
sections.description: The short 'u' sound as in 'bulb' — at the beginning or middle of words

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'u' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Um-brel-la' — the short 'u' sound is right at the start

questions.prompt: 'Truck' has the short 'u' sound in the ___.
questions.hint: 'Truck' — the 'u' makes a short sound in the middle

questions.prompt: The verse says 'The sun is up.' This means ___.
questions.hint: When the sun is up, it is shining brightly in the sky

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'u' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: 'Duck' — the 'u' makes a short 'uh' sound in the middle

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'u' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'Un-cle' — the short 'u' starts this word about your parent's brother

questions.prompt: What is the plural of 'umbrella'?
questions.hint: Add 's' to make most nouns plural

questions.prompt: Which word has the SHORT 'u' sound?
questions.hint: 'Duck' has the short 'u' — the others all have the long 'u' sound

questions.prompt: Which of these words would go in the 'initial Uu sound' basket?
questions.hint: 'Under' starts with the short 'u' sound — it's an initial 'u' word

sections.title: Long Uu Sound
sections.description: The long 'u' sound as in 'unit' — the letter says its own name!

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'u' sound?
questions.hint: 'Cube' — the 'u' says its own name, making the long 'yoo' sound

questions.prompt: I went with my friends to the ___ festival.
questions.hint: A music festival has singing and instruments — the long 'u' in 'mu-sic'

questions.prompt: I plan to go to ___ when I am older.
questions.hint: This is a place for higher learning — like college

questions.prompt: The child rode the ___ on the busy road.
questions.hint: A unicycle has only ONE wheel — uni means one!

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'u' sound at the BEGINNING?
questions.hint: 'U-nit' — the 'u' says its own name right at the start

questions.prompt: 'Menu' has the long 'u' sound at the ___.
questions.hint: 'Men-u' — the long 'u' sound is at the very end of the word

questions.prompt: Which word has the LONG 'u' sound in the MIDDLE?
questions.hint: 'Mu-sic' — the 'u' in the first syllable makes the long sound
